---
title: "数据可视化基础"
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  fig-width: 7
  fig-asp: 0.618
---

# 数据可视化基础

好的图表胜过千言万语。本章介绍 ggplot2 的语法体系和科研论文级图表的制作方法。

> **数据来源**：本章示例数据结合两个真实数据源：
> 1. Li et al. (2017) 喀斯特土壤碳氮研究 (DOI: 10.1002/2016JG003683)
> 2. Du et al. (2020) 广西木论保护区物种组成数据 (DOI: 10.11922/csdata.2019.0031.zh)

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

## ggplot2 语法体系

ggplot2 基于 Wilkinson 提出的"图形语法"（Grammar of Graphics）理论（Wilkinson, 2005, *The Grammar of Graphics*, 2nd ed., Springer, DOI: 10.1007/0-387-28695-0），将图表分解为几个核心组件：

```
ggplot(data, aes(x, y)) +   # 数据和映射
  geom_xxx() +                # 几何对象（画什么）
  scale_xxx() +               # 标度（怎么映射）
  labs() +                    # 标签
  theme()                     # 主题（外观）
```

::: {.callout-note}
### `aes()` 是什么？

`aes()` 是 aesthetic mapping（美学映射）的缩写，它告诉 ggplot2 如何将数据变量映射到图形属性上：

- `aes(x = soil_ph)` → 将 soil_ph 映射到 x 轴
- `aes(color = habitat)` → 将 habitat 映射到颜色
- `aes(size = elevation)` → 将 elevation 映射到点的大小

关键区别：写在 `aes()` 里面的属性由数据驱动（每个数据点可以不同），写在 `aes()` 外面的属性是固定值（所有点相同）。例如 `geom_point(aes(color = habitat))` 按生境着色，而 `geom_point(color = "red")` 所有点都是红色。
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
### `+` 运算符

ggplot2 使用 `+` 将图层逐层叠加。每个 `+` 后面添加一个新的组件（几何对象、标度、主题等）。注意 `+` 必须放在行末，不能放在下一行的开头：

```r
# 正确
ggplot(data, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point()

# 错误（+ 不能在行首）
ggplot(data, aes(x, y))
  + geom_point()
```
:::

## 示例数据

基于 Li et al. (2017) 喀斯特土壤研究的参数范围，生成模拟数据：

```{r}
set.seed(2027)
n <- 100

# 基于Li et al. (2017)的实际参数范围生成
ecology <- tibble(
  # 土地利用类型
  land_use = sample(c("耕地", "草地", "灌丛", "次生林"), n, replace = TRUE,
                    prob = c(0.25, 0.30, 0.25, 0.20)),

  # 岩性类型
  lithology = sample(c("白云岩", "石灰岩"), n, replace = TRUE),

  # 土壤理化性质（基于实测范围）
  species_richness = rpois(n, lambda = 15 + rnorm(n, 0, 5)),  # 物种丰富度
  soil_ph = rnorm(n, 6.0, 0.6),                                # pH 5-7
  organic_carbon = rlnorm(n, log(20), 0.5),                   # SOC 右偏分布
  elevation = round(runif(n, 200, 1200)),                      # 海拔

  # 季节
  season = sample(c("春", "夏", "秋", "冬"), n, replace = TRUE)
)

head(ecology, 10)
```

## 常用图表类型

### 散点图

```{r}
ggplot(ecology, aes(x = soil_ph, y = species_richness)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(x = "土壤 pH", y = "物种丰富度", title = "土壤 pH 与物种丰富度的关系") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### 分组散点图

```{r}
ggplot(ecology, aes(x = soil_ph, y = species_richness, color = land_use)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "土壤 pH", y = "物种丰富度", color = "土地利用") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### 箱线图

```{r}
ggplot(ecology, aes(x = land_use, y = species_richness, fill = land_use)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = 21) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.3, size = 1) +
  labs(x = "", y = "物种丰富度", title = "不同土地利用类型的物种丰富度") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

### 直方图与密度图

```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = organic_carbon)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  labs(x = "有机碳 (g/kg)", y = "频次", title = "直方图") +
  theme_minimal()

p2 <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = organic_carbon, fill = land_use)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "有机碳 (g/kg)", y = "密度", title = "密度图", fill = "土地利用") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 + p2
```

### 柱状图

```{r}
ecology |>
  group_by(land_use) |>
  summarise(
    mean_richness = mean(species_richness),
    se = sd(species_richness) / sqrt(n())
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(land_use, -mean_richness), y = mean_richness, fill = land_use)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_richness - se, ymax = mean_richness + se),
                width = 0.2) +
  labs(x = "", y = "平均物种丰富度 (± SE)", title = "不同土地利用类型的平均物种丰富度") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

### 热力图（相关性矩阵）

```{r}
# 计算相关系数
cor_matrix <- ecology |>
  select(species_richness, soil_ph, organic_carbon, elevation) |>
  cor()

# 转为长格式绘图
cor_matrix |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  rownames_to_column("var1") |>
  pivot_longer(-var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "cor") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = var1, y = var2, fill = cor)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(cor, 2)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "steelblue", mid = "white", high = "coral",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(title = "变量相关性矩阵", x = "", y = "", fill = "相关系数") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## 科研论文级图表

### 自定义主题

```{r}
theme_paper <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2),
    axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
    axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1)
  )
}
```

### 多面板组合图

```{r}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-asp: 0.5

p_scatter <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = elevation, y = species_richness)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = land_use), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "海拔 (m)", y = "物种丰富度", color = "土地利用") +
  theme_paper()

p_box <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = land_use, y = organic_carbon, fill = land_use)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(x = "", y = "有机碳 (g/kg)", title = "不同土地利用类型") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_paper() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 组合并添加标签
p_scatter + p_box +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a", tag_prefix = "(", tag_suffix = ")") +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.5, 1))
```

### 导出高质量图片

```{r}
#| eval: false

# 将图表保存到变量中
p_final <- p_scatter + p_box +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a", tag_prefix = "(", tag_suffix = ")")

# 确保输出目录存在
dir.create("output/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# 保存为 PDF（矢量图，论文首选）
ggsave("output/figures/fig1_diversity.pdf", plot = p_final, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# 保存为 PNG（位图，PPT/网页用）
ggsave("output/figures/fig1_diversity.png", plot = p_final, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# 保存为 TIFF（某些期刊要求）
ggsave("output/figures/fig1_diversity.tiff", plot = p_final, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 600,
       compression = "lzw")
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## 期刊图表要求

- 分辨率：通常 ≥ 300 dpi（线图 600 dpi）
- 格式：PDF/EPS（矢量）或 TIFF（位图）
- 字体大小：图中文字 ≥ 8pt
- 配色：考虑色盲友好（避免红绿搭配，推荐 viridis 色板）
- 图注：在图下方，不在图内
:::

## 色盲友好配色：viridis

viridis 色板在亮度上均匀变化，对色盲用户友好，打印为灰度图时也能区分。ggplot2 内置了 viridis 系列函数：

```{r}
# 离散变量：scale_color_viridis_d()
p1 <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = soil_ph, y = species_richness, color = land_use)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D") +
  labs(x = "土壤 pH", y = "物种丰富度", color = "土地利用", title = "viridis 离散配色") +
  theme_minimal()

# 连续变量：scale_color_viridis_c()
p2 <- ggplot(ecology, aes(x = soil_ph, y = species_richness, color = elevation)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  labs(x = "土壤 pH", y = "物种丰富度", color = "海拔 (m)", title = "viridis 连续配色") +
  theme_minimal()

p1 + p2
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## viridis 色板选项

`option` 参数可选 `"A"`（magma）、`"B"`（inferno）、`"C"`（plasma）、`"D"`（viridis，默认）、`"E"`（cividis）。科研论文推荐使用 `"D"` 或 `"E"`。
:::

## 图表类型选择指南

在开始绑图之前，先根据数据类型和分析目的选择合适的图表：

| 数据组合 | 推荐图表 | ggplot2 函数 |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 连续 vs 连续 | 散点图 | `geom_point()` + `geom_smooth()` |
| 分类 vs 连续 | 箱线图 / 小提琴图 | `geom_boxplot()` / `geom_violin()` |
| 单变量分布 | 直方图 / 密度图 | `geom_histogram()` / `geom_density()` |
| 多变量相关 | 热力图（相关矩阵） | `geom_tile()` |
| 分类计数 | 柱状图 | `geom_bar()` / `geom_col()` |
| 时间序列 | 折线图 | `geom_line()` |

## 课后练习

1. 用 `iris` 数据集绘制花瓣长度 vs 花瓣宽度的散点图，按物种着色
2. 绘制三个物种花萼长度的箱线图，添加抖动点
3. 创建一个 2×2 的组合图（散点图 + 箱线图 + 直方图 + 密度图）
4. 应用自定义主题，导出为 PDF
5. 尝试使用 `scale_color_viridis_d()` 替换默认配色

## 参考文献

- Wilkinson, L. (2005). *The Grammar of Graphics* (2nd ed.). Springer. DOI: 10.1007/0-387-28695-0
- Li, D., Wen, L., Yang, L., Luo, P., Xiao, W., Chen, H., ... & Wang, K. (2017). Dynamics of soil organic carbon and nitrogen following agricultural abandonment in a karst region. *Journal of Geophysical Research: Biogeosciences*, 122(11), 2849-2864. DOI: 10.1002/2016JG003683
- Du, H., Peng, W., Song, T., Zeng, F., Wang, K., Fu, W. (2020). A species composition dataset of a typical subtropical mixed evergreen and deciduous broad-leaved forest in karst ecosystem (2014) [DB/OL]. Science Data Bank. DOI: 10.11922/csdata.2019.0031.zh
